action.reasoning: Observation: 20 epochs hurt test (0.4575 vs 0.5228 at 5 epochs) despite val improving to 0.84. Classic domain overfitting. Analysis: Model memorizes source domain backgrounds. Need domain-invariant features. Decision: Switch to DINOv2 with frozen backbone (only train head) - should generalize much better. Also try ensemble of DINOv2 + CLIP features.
